_comment_sel: Leg-selection parameters used by Auto-Fill (Step 3). ce_delta/pe_delta = target delta for near-expiry leg picks. vega_tol = fractional tolerance for next-expiry vega matching (0.3 = 30% of target vega, min window ±2).
_comment_pre: Pre-trade check ranges. Trade is flagged if combined Greeks fall outside these bounds.
_comment_mon: Live-monitoring alert ranges. Alert fires when combined Greeks breach these bounds.

pre_trade.delta: Selected trade is NOT as per expected delta range, please check for other strikes and expiry combinations
pre_trade.theta: Selected trade is NOT as per expected theta range, please check for other strikes and expiry combinations
pre_trade.vega: Selected trade is NOT as per expected vega range, please check for other strikes and expiry combinations
pre_trade.gamma: Selected trade is NOT as per expected gamma range, please check for other strikes and expiry combinations

monitoring.delta: Allowed Delta monitoring range is reached, proceed for adjustment or exit trade
monitoring.theta: Allowed Theta monitoring range is reached, proceed for adjustment or exit trade
monitoring.vega: Allowed Vega monitoring range is reached, proceed for adjustment or exit trade
monitoring.gamma: Allowed Gamma monitoring range is reached, proceed for adjustment or exit trade
